---
title: "Attendance Record | R for Researchers"
subtitle: "3rd SARA Summer School"
author: "22-26 July 2026 | Sonipat (HR)"
format:
  typst:
    page-orientation: landscape
abstract-title: "Welcome!"
classoption: "landscape"
abstract: |
  |
  |
  | - Please arrive on time and sign the attendance sheet upon entry  
  | - Maintain respectful and professional conduct throughout the session
  | - Mobile phones on silent mode
  | - Your cooperation helps create a productive learning environment for all
  |  
  | 
  | All the best to all the participants.
  |
  |
  | Dr. Ajay Koli
  | Founder & Director of SARA
  | Contact: 925 315 2024
  | Email: sara.institute.info@gmail.com


---

```{=typst}
#set page(
  flipped: true,
  header: [
  _Attendance of the Participants of 3rd SARA Summer School “R for Researchers” 22-26 July 2026_
  #h(1fr)
  #box(image("logo-sara.png", width:5%))
])

#set page(footer: context [
  Event website https://sara-edu.netlify.app/summer/2026-r4b/
  #h(1fr)
  #counter(page).display(
  "1/1",
  both: true,
)
])
```


```{=typst} 
#v(10pt)

#set table(
  fill: (x, y) =>
    if x == 0 or y == 0 {
      gray.lighten(40%)
    },
  align: right,
  
)

#show table.cell.where(x: 0): strong
#show table.cell.where(y: 0): strong

#table(
  columns: (0.5fr, 1.5fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  rows: (1.25cm),
  stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("666675"), 
  align: left + horizon,

  table.header(
    [S.No.], [*Name of the Participant*], [*Wed 22 Jul*], [*Thu 23 Jul*], [*Fri 24 Jul*], [*Sat 25 Jul*], [*Sun 26 Jul*],
  ),

  [1.], [Vaishnavi Humane], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [2.], [Dr. Ashok Kumar], [], [], [], [], [],
  [3.], [Rajat Kumar], [], [], [], [], [],
  [4.], [Dr. G. Dhananjhay], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [5.], [Aishwarya Karan], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [6.], [Roshan Pandey], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [7.], [Dalphin Suna], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [8.], [Dr. Priyanka Ch.], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [9.], [Kajal Mahor], [], [], [], [], [], 
  [10.], [Kriti Dhuriya], [], [], [], [], [],
  [11.], [Achal Bujade], [], [], [], [], [],
  [12.], [Yogendra Kumar], [], [], [], [], [],
  [13.], [Tushar Jadhav], [], [], [], [], [],
  [14.], [Rajeshri Mandloi], [], [], [], [], [],
  [15.], [Ankita Hirwani], [], [], [], [], [],
  [16.], [], [], [], [], [], [],
  [17.], [], [], [], [], [], [],
  [18.], [], [], [], [], [], [],
  [19.], [], [], [], [], [], [],
  [20.], [], [], [], [], [], [],
  
)

```
